g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is in the JWT the user carries?')
sendPrompt('What does the connected app do with the JWT?')
g.text: SDK verifies JWT signature using OpenGuard JWKS

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the SDK policy cache work?')
g.text: SDK local cache checked first (60s TTL) · then Redis · then evaluator

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does row-level security protect data inside the database?')
g.text: PostgreSQL row-level security: org_id matches session variable
Even a broken query can never expose another org's data

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What events does OpenGuard audit on every access?')
g.text: Access event written to audit trail
Threat engine watches for anomalies in the background

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the user see when access is granted?')
g.text: Only their org's data · scoped to their role

svg.text: Why the user is safe on every app:
JWT signature · MFA at login · policy evaluation per action · RLS isolates org data · every access hashed into audit chain
Threat engine watches all activity — alerts fire before damage is done
